LAW AND MOTION, 302 DEFENDANTS DAVID BASS AND MIHUI BASS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT RULE ON THE LEGALITY OF THE INTEREST RATE. HOWEVER, EVEN AN IMPROPER INTEREST REQUEST WOULD BE SUBJECT TO SEVERANCE. A PARTY CAN BRING AN UNJUST ENRICHMENT CAUSE OF ACTION WHERE A CONTRACT IS ILLEGAL. SEE DUNKIN V. BOSKEY (2000) 82 CAL.APP.4TH 171. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS DAVID BASS AND MIHUI BASS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

APPEARANCES: Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. of Provencher & Flatt LLP 707/284-2380 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Jaime Vincent Raba, Esq. of Law Offices of Jaime Vincent Raba 669-4587 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT RULE ON THE LEGALITY OF THE INTEREST RATE. HOWEVER, EVEN AN IMPROPER INTEREST REQUEST WOULD BE SUBJECT TO SEVERANCE. A PARTY CAN BRING AN UNJUST ENRICHMENT CAUSE OF ACTION WHERE A CONTRACT IS ILLEGAL. SEE DUNKIN V. BOSKEY (2000) 82 CAL.APP.4TH 171. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
